description: Search for or read a FHIR Practitioner resource. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide at least one of: identifier, name, given + family, email, phone, or telecom. This resource represents healthcare providers — physicians, nurses, pharmacists, etc.

searchParams._id: Practitioner resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.address-use: Use of the address (home, work, temp, old, billing)
searchParams.name: Any part of the practitioner's name
searchParams.phonetic: A portion of name using phonetic matching
